headline: Are investors rotating out of market leaders for the long-term?
summary: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management chief portfolio manager Matt Stucky sits down with Josh Lipton to address recent notes out from Goldman Sachs on the global market outlook and the new market leadership that investors are rotating into. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

content.title: Are investors rotating out of market leaders for the long-term?
